action.proof_term:
intro n hn H hdvd
  obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
  have hq1 : 1 ≤ q := (by omega)
  have hprime2 : ∀ x : ℕ, 2 ≤ x → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x ≤ 2 → Nat.Prime x := by
    intro x hx hs
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hs
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := (by omega)
    have hsub : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ x.divisors := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hy
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      rcases hy with rfl | rfl
      · exact ⟨one_dvd _, hx0⟩
      · exact ⟨dvd_rfl, hx0⟩
    have hc2 : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp; omega), Finset.card_singleton]
    have heq : x.divisors = {1, x} := (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by rw [hc2]; exact hs)).symm
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro mm hmlt hmdvd
    have hmem : mm ∈ x.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hmdvd, hx0⟩
    rw [heq] at hmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hmem
    rcases hmem with h1 | h1
    · exact h1
    · omega
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) ≤ 10 := by
    have hsub : n - 8 < n := (by omega)
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let mm : Fin n := ⟨n - 8, hsub⟩
    have hm : f mm ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd mm) H
    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  have hval : (n - 8) / 8 = 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  have hn8 : n - 8 = 8 * (315 * q - 1) := (by omega)
  have hr314 : 314 ≤ 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  rw [hval]
  obtain ⟨a, s, hs_odd, hrs⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_two_pow_mul_odd (show 315 * q - 1 ≠ 0 by omega)
  have hs1 : 1 ≤ s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h | h
    · rw [h, Nat.mul_zero] at hrs; omega
    · exact h
  have hodd2 : ¬ (2 ∣ s) := (by have := Nat.odd_iff.mp hs_odd; omega)
  have hcop2 : Nat.Coprime 2 s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hodd2
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 3)) s := hcop2.pow_left (a + 3)
  have hn8s : n - 8 = 2 ^ (a + 3) * s := (by rw [hn8, hrs, pow_add]; ring)
  have hsig8 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) = (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn8s, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow Nat.prime_two]
    ring
  have hbudget : (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := (by rw [← hsig8]; exact shift)
  have hcases : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 ∨ 2 ≤ a := (by omega)
  rcases hcases with rfl | rfl | ha
  · have hrs0 : (315 * q - 1) = s := (by rw [hrs]; ring)
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (315 * q - 1) ≤ 2 := (by rw [hrs0]; omega)
    exact Or.inl (hprime2 (315 * q - 1) (by omega) hsle)
  · have hrs1 : (315 * q - 1) = 2 * s := (by rw [hrs]; ring)
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 2 := (by omega)
    exact Or.inr ⟨s, hprime2 s (by omega) hsle, hrs1⟩
  · have h6 : 6 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 :=
      le_trans (mul_le_mul_right' (by omega : (6:ℕ) ≤ a + 4) _) hbudget
    have hsle1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := (by omega)
    have hs_eq1 : s = 1 := by
      by_contra hne
      have hge2 : 2 ≤ s := (by omega)
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsle1
      have hcard : 1 < s.divisors.card :=
        Finset.one_lt_card.mpr ⟨1, Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega), s, Nat.mem_divisors_self s (by omega), by omega⟩
      omega
    rw [hs_eq1, Nat.mul_one] at hrs
    have h2a : (314 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ a := hrs ▸ hr314
    have hsig1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s = 1 := (by rw [hs_eq1]; native_decide)
    rw [hsig1, Nat.mul_one] at hbudget
    have hpow : (2:ℕ) ^ a < 314 := by
      calc (2:ℕ) ^ a ≤ 2 ^ 6 := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (by omega)
        _ < 314 := by norm_num
    exact absurd h2a (not_le.mpr hpow)

intro n hn H hdvd
  obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
  have hq1 : 1 ≤ q := (by omega)
  have hprime2 : ∀ x : ℕ, 2 ≤ x → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x ≤ 2 → Nat.Prime x := by

    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hs
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := (by omega)

      intro y hy
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hy
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      rcases hy with rfl | rfl
      · exact ⟨one_dvd _, hx0⟩
      · exact ⟨dvd_rfl, hx0⟩
    have hc2 : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by

    have heq : x.divisors = {1, x} := (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by rw [hc2]; exact hs)).symm
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro mm hmlt hmdvd
    have hmem : mm ∈ x.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hmdvd, hx0⟩
    rw [heq] at hmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hmem

    · exact h1
    · omega

    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  have hval : (n - 8) / 8 = 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)

  obtain ⟨a, s, hs_odd, hrs⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_two_pow_mul_odd (show 315 * q - 1 ≠ 0 by omega)
  have hs1 : 1 ≤ s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h | h
    · rw [h, Nat.mul_zero] at hrs; omega
    · exact h
  have hodd2 : ¬ (2 ∣ s) := (by have := Nat.odd_iff.mp hs_odd; omega)
  have hcop2 : Nat.Coprime 2 s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hodd2
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 3)) s := hcop2.pow_left (a + 3)
  have hn8s : n - 8 = 2 ^ (a + 3) * s := (by rw [hn8, hrs, pow_add]; ring)
  have hsig8 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) = (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn8s, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow Nat.prime_two]
    ring
  have hbudget : (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := (by rw [← hsig8]; exact shift)
  have hcases : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 ∨ 2 ≤ a := (by omega)
  rcases hcases with rfl | rfl | ha
  · have hrs0 : (315 * q - 1) = s := (by rw [hrs]; ring)
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (315 * q - 1) ≤ 2 := (by rw [hrs0]; omega)
    exact Or.inl (hprime2 (315 * q - 1) (by omega) hsle)
  · have hrs1 : (315 * q - 1) = 2 * s := (by rw [hrs]; ring)
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 2 := (by omega)

  · have h6 : 6 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 :=

    have hs_eq1 : s = 1 := by
      by_contra hne

      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsle1
      have hcard : 1 < s.divisors.card :=
        Finset.one_lt_card.mpr ⟨1, Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega), s, Nat.mem_divisors_self s (by omega), by omega⟩
      omega
    rw [hs_eq1, Nat.mul_one] at hrs
    have h2a : (314 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ a := hrs ▸ hr314
    have hsig1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s = 1 := (by rw [hs_eq1]; native_decide)
    rw [hsig1, Nat.mul_one] at hbudget
    have hpow : (2:ℕ) ^ a < 314 := by

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → Nat.Prime ((n - 8) / 8) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ (n - 8) / 8 = 2 * p

  have hs1 : 1 ≤ s := by

    · rw [h, Nat.mul_zero] at hrs; omega
    · exact h
  have hodd2 : ¬ (2 ∣ s) := (by have := Nat.odd_iff.mp hs_odd; omega)
  have hcop2 : Nat.Coprime 2 s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hodd2
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 3)) s := hcop2.pow_left (a + 3)
  have hn8s : n - 8 = 2 ^ (a + 3) * s := (by rw [hn8, hrs, pow_add]; ring)
  have hsig8 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) = (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn8s, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow Nat.prime_two]
    ring
  have hbudget : (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := (by rw [← hsig8]; exact shift)
  rcases Nat.lt_or_ge a 2 with hlt | hge
  · have ha01 : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 := (by omega)
    rcases ha01 with h0 | h1
    · subst h0
      refine Or.inl (hprime2 (315 * q - 1) (by omega) ?_)
      rw [show (315 * q - 1) = s from by rw [hrs]; ring]
      omega
    · subst h1
      refine Or.inr ⟨s, hprime2 s (by omega) (by omega), ?_⟩
      rw [hrs]; ring
  · exfalso
    have h6 : 6 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 :=
      le_trans (mul_le_mul_right' (by omega : (6:ℕ) ≤ a + 4) _) hbudget
    have hsle1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := (by omega)
    have hs_eq1 : s = 1 := by
      by_contra hne
      have hge2 : 2 ≤ s := (by omega)
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsle1
      have hcard : 1 < s.divisors.card :=
        Finset.one_lt_card.mpr ⟨1, Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega), s, Nat.mem_divisors_self s (by omega), by omega⟩
      omega
    rw [hs_eq1, Nat.mul_one] at hrs
    have hsig1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s = 1 := (by rw [hs_eq1]; native_decide)
    rw [hsig1, Nat.mul_one] at hbudget
    have h2a : (314 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ a := hrs ▸ hr314
    refine absurd h2a (not_le.mpr ?_)
    calc (2:ℕ) ^ a ≤ 2 ^ 6 := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (by omega)
      _ < 314 := by norm_num

intro n hn H hdvd
  obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
  have hq1 : 1 ≤ q := (by omega)
  have hprime2 : ∀ x : ℕ, 2 ≤ x → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x ≤ 2 → Nat.Prime x := by
    intro x hx hs
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hs
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := (by omega)
    have hsub : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ x.divisors := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hy
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      rcases hy with rfl | rfl
      · exact ⟨one_dvd _, hx0⟩
      · exact ⟨dvd_rfl, hx0⟩
    have hc2 : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp; omega), Finset.card_singleton]
    have heq : x.divisors = {1, x} := (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by rw [hc2]; exact hs)).symm
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro mm hmlt hmdvd
    have hmem : mm ∈ x.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hmdvd, hx0⟩
    rw [heq] at hmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hmem
    rcases hmem with h1 | h1
    · exact h1
    · omega
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) ≤ 10 := by
    have hsub : n - 8 < n := (by omega)
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let mm : Fin n := ⟨n - 8, hsub⟩
    have hm : f mm ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd mm) H
    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  have hval : (n - 8) / 8 = 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  have hn8 : n - 8 = 8 * (315 * q - 1) := (by omega)
  have hr314 : 314 ≤ 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  rw [hval]
  obtain ⟨a, s, hs_odd, hrs⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_two_pow_mul_odd (show 315 * q - 1 ≠ 0 by omega)
  have hs1 : 1 ≤ s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h | h
    · rw [h, Nat.mul_zero] at hrs; omega
    · exact h
  have hodd2 : ¬ (2 ∣ s) := (by have := Nat.odd_iff.mp hs_odd; omega)
  have hcop2 : Nat.Coprime 2 s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hodd2
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 3)) s := hcop2.pow_left (a + 3)
  have hn8s : n - 8 = 2 ^ (a + 3) * s := (by rw [hn8, hrs, pow_add]; ring)
  have hsig8 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) = (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn8s, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow Nat.prime_two]
    ring
  have hbudget : (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := (by rw [← hsig8]; exact shift)
  rcases Nat.lt_or_ge a 2 with hlt | hge
  · have ha01 : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 := (by omega)
    rcases ha01 with h0 | h1
    · subst h0
      refine Or.inl (hprime2 (315 * q - 1) (by omega) ?_)
      rw [show (315 * q - 1) = s from by rw [hrs]; ring]
      omega
    · subst h1
      refine Or.inr ⟨s, hprime2 s (by omega) (by omega), ?_⟩
      rw [hrs]; ring
  · exfalso
    have h6 : 6 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 :=
      le_trans (mul_le_mul_right' (by omega : (6:ℕ) ≤ a + 4) _) hbudget
    have hsle1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := (by omega)
    have hs_eq1 : s = 1 := by
      by_contra hne
      have hge2 : 2 ≤ s := (by omega)
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsle1
      have hcard : 1 < s.divisors.card :=
        Finset.one_lt_card.mpr ⟨1, Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega), s, Nat.mem_divisors_self s (by omega), by omega⟩
      omega
    rw [hs_eq1, Nat.mul_one] at hrs
    have hsig1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s = 1 := (by rw [hs_eq1]; native_decide)
    rw [hsig1, Nat.mul_one] at hbudget
    have h2a : (314 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ a := hrs ▸ hr314
    refine absurd h2a (not_le.mpr ?_)
    calc (2:ℕ) ^ a ≤ 2 ^ 6 := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (by omega)
      _ < 314 := by norm_num

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → Nat.Prime ((n - 8) / 8) ∨ ∃ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p ∧ (n - 8) / 8 = 2 * p

action.proof_term:
intro n hn H hdvd
  obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := hdvd
  have hq1 : 1 ≤ q := (by omega)
  have hprime2 : ∀ x : ℕ, 2 ≤ x → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x ≤ 2 → Nat.Prime x := by
    intro x hx hs
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hs
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := (by omega)
    have hsub : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ x.divisors := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hy
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      rcases hy with rfl | rfl
      · exact ⟨one_dvd _, hx0⟩
      · exact ⟨dvd_rfl, hx0⟩
    have hc2 : ({1, x} : Finset ℕ).card = 2 := by
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem (by simp; omega), Finset.card_singleton]
    have heq : x.divisors = {1, x} := (Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by rw [hc2]; exact hs)).symm
    rw [Nat.prime_def_lt]
    refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
    intro mm hmlt hmdvd
    have hmem : mm ∈ x.divisors := Nat.mem_divisors.mpr ⟨hmdvd, hx0⟩
    rw [heq] at hmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hmem
    rcases hmem with h1 | h1
    · exact h1
    · omega
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) ≤ 10 := by
    have hsub : n - 8 < n := (by omega)
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let mm : Fin n := ⟨n - 8, hsub⟩
    have hm : f mm ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd mm) H
    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  have hval : (n - 8) / 8 = 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  have hn8 : n - 8 = 8 * (315 * q - 1) := (by omega)
  have hr314 : 314 ≤ 315 * q - 1 := (by omega)
  rw [hval]
  obtain ⟨a, s, hs_odd, hrs⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_two_pow_mul_odd (show 315 * q - 1 ≠ 0 by omega)
  have hs1 : 1 ≤ s := by
    rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos s with h | h
    · rw [h, Nat.mul_zero] at hrs; omega
    · exact h
  have hcop2 : Nat.Coprime 2 s := (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr (by have := Nat.odd_iff.mp hs_odd; omega)
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (a + 3)) s := hcop2.pow_left (a + 3)
  have hn8s : n - 8 = 2 ^ (a + 3) * s := by rw [hn8, hrs, pow_add] <;> ring
  have hsig8 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 8) = (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s := by
    rw [hn8s, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow Nat.prime_two] <;> ring
  have hbudget : (a + 4) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := (by rw [← hsig8]; exact shift)
  have hcases : a = 0 ∨ a = 1 ∨ 2 ≤ a := (by omega)
  rcases hcases with rfl | rfl | ha
  · have hrs0 : (315 * q - 1) = s := by rw [hrs] <;> ring
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (315 * q - 1) ≤ 2 := by rw [hrs0]; omega
    exact Or.inl (hprime2 (315 * q - 1) (by omega) hsle)
  · have hrs1 : (315 * q - 1) = 2 * s := by rw [hrs] <;> ring
    have hsle : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 2 := (by omega)
    exact Or.inr ⟨s, hprime2 s (by omega) hsle, hrs1⟩
  · exfalso
    have h6 : 6 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 10 := le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right (ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s) (by omega : (6:ℕ) ≤ a + 4)) hbudget
    have hsle1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s ≤ 1 := (by omega)
    have hs_eq1 : s = 1 := by
      by_contra hne
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply] at hsle1
      have hcard : 1 < s.divisors.card := Finset.one_lt_card.mpr ⟨1, Nat.one_mem_divisors.mpr (by omega), s, Nat.mem_divisors_self s (by omega), by omega⟩
      omega
    have hsig1 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 s = 1 := (by rw [hs_eq1]; native_decide)
    have hale6 : a ≤ 6 := by rw [hsig1, Nat.mul_one] at hbudget; omega
    rw [hs_eq1, Nat.mul_one] at hrs
    have h2a : (314 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ a := hrs ▸ hr314
    have hpow : (2:ℕ) ^ a ≤ 2 ^ 6 := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) hale6
    have h64 : (2:ℕ) ^ 6 = 64 := (by norm_num)
    omega

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
